exclude.eslint: v9+ requires flat config migration, blocked by eslint 8.x ecosystem
exclude.eslint-plugin-jsonc: v3 requires eslint >= 9.38, blocked by eslint 8.x
exclude.eslint-plugin-unicorn: v57+ requires eslint >= 9.20, blocked by eslint 8.x
exclude.typescript: 4.9.x introduces stricter AbortSignal types that break build
exclude.uri-template-lite: v23 removes URI export, requires wrapper rewrite in src/util/uri-template-lite.js
exclude.zod: v4 type definitions require TypeScript >= 5.x, blocked by typescript exclusion
